description: Symmetry group data for quasicrystal systems

point_groups.name: Icosahedral Ih
point_groups.character_table_note: Available in group theory references; A_g, T_1g, T_2g, G_g, H_g + ungerade partners

point_groups.name: Decagonal D10h
point_groups.notes: Periodic along 10-fold axis, quasiperiodic in plane

why_forbidden_symmetries_possible: In periodic crystals, only 1,2,3,4,6-fold rotations are compatible with translational symmetry (crystallographic restriction theorem). Quasicrystals have long-range order without strict translational symmetry, so these constraints do not apply. The symmetry is realized in higher-dimensional space where it IS compatible with a (higher-dimensional) lattice.
